tools.name: get_provider_limits
tools.description: Get published rate limit specs (RPM, TPM, RPD, context window) for an AI provider and optional model.

tools.name: list_providers
tools.description: List all AI providers supported by the tracker with their models and default limits.

tools.name: track_usage
tools.description: Record an AI API call and get real-time usage counters plus warnings if approaching limits.

tools.name: get_forecast
tools.description: Forecast when rate limits will be exhausted and get scheduling recommendations.
